Islam has FedEx Account (693472997) which he is trying to add on his WooCommerce Store using our plugin. However, the Account Registration is failing. We have tried using the details available in the FedEx Account Profile on fedex.com but the Registration is still failing.

Once done, during the Registration process, select the validation type as HELPDESK and complete the registration.

Please reach out to us if you face any difficulties and we will assist you further.

Thanks and Regards,
